title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Saksoft

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Saksoft
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Saksoft. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About Saksoft:
Saksoft is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft!
